company.fr: Crédit Mutuel Arkéa | Banque de Détail

context.fr: Direction d'un cadre commun de pilotage des initiatives du Plan stratégique en banque de détail.
context.en: Leading a shared steering framework for Retail Banking's strategic-plan initiatives.

fr: Cadre commun de qualification des initiatives du Plan stratégique (12-18 mois), alignant marketing, data, expérience client et process.
Application PMO sur mesure (Apps Script : Kanban, KPI, jalons, alertes) + POC génération auto de comptes rendus.
Gain capacitaire estimé 440–2760 h/an (~31–135 k€/an), traçabilité des décisions, effet plateforme.
en: Built a shared qualification framework for the strategic plan (12-18 months), aligning marketing, data, customer experience and process teams.
Built a custom PMO application (Apps Script: Kanban, KPIs, milestones, alerts) plus a committee-minutes automation PoC.
Delivered an estimated capacity gain of 440-2,760 h/year (~EUR 31-135k/year) through decision traceability and process standardization.

context.fr: Cadrage amont et prototypage d'un MVP d'application interne métier.
context.en: Upstream framing and prototyping of an internal business-application MVP.

fr: Design Thinking, prototypage Figma, parcours UX/UI, backlog Kanban itératif, facilitation Dev-Design.
POC validé + prototype livré + roadmap MVP exploitable sans retro-cadrage.
en: Design thinking, Figma prototyping, UX/UI journeys, iterative Kanban backlog, Dev-Design facilitation.
Validated PoC, delivered prototype, and an actionable MVP roadmap with no rework.

context.fr: Support bid management sur un portefeuille d'offres Défense multi-milieux à forts enjeux financiers.
context.en: Bid management support on a high-stakes, multi-domain Defense bid portfolio.

fr: Portefeuille +50 offres Défense multi-milieux, budgets jusqu'à >1Md€ ; pilotage financier RC/NRC, optimisation marge.
Industrialisation Excel/VBA de la gestion des risques (ROR) : 3h → 15 min par offre (-92%).
RETEX stratégique mandaté par la GBU ISR, rapport CODIR ; « au-dessus des attentes sur 7 livrables / 10 ».
en: Managed a 50+ bid multi-domain Defense portfolio, budgets up to >EUR 1B; RC/NRC financial steering, margin optimization.
Industrialized Excel/VBA risk management (ROR): 3h to 15 min per bid (-92%).
Delivered a strategic lessons-learned audit mandated by the ISR GBU to CODIR DMS France; "above expectations on 7 of 10 deliverables".

role.fr: Product Owner + Coach Agile | CRM sécurisé
role.en: Product Owner + Agile Coach | Secure CRM

context.fr: Double rôle PO + Coach Agile sur la livraison d'un CRM sécurisé pour un client grand compte.
context.en: Dual PO + Agile Coach role delivering a secure CRM for a major account.

fr: Double rôle PO + Coach Agile sur 2 équipes ; cérémonies Scrum, User Stories, critères d'acceptation, tests Postman.
Seul PO ayant livré ses 2 équipes (sur 5), MVP < 2 mois ; félicitations jury (Lead Tech Capgemini + Expert Cyber Orange).
en: Dual PO + Agile Coach role across 2 teams; Scrum ceremonies, user stories, acceptance criteria, Postman tests.
Only PO to deliver both of his teams (out of 5), MVP in < 2 months; jury commendation (Capgemini Lead Tech + Orange Cyber Expert).

context.fr: Gestion d'actifs locatifs courte durée en autonomie totale, du cycle locatif à la relation client.
context.en: Fully autonomous short-term rental asset management, from the rental cycle to guest relations.

fr: Pilotage intégralité du cycle locatif courte durée (AirBnB) en autonomie totale.
Coordination logistique, maintenance, asset management et interface unique propriétaires/locataires.
Taux d'occupation >90% en période haute, taux de satisfaction 88%.
en: Ran the entire short-term rental cycle (Airbnb) end-to-end and fully autonomously.
Logistics coordination, maintenance and asset management; single point of contact for owners and guests.
Delivered >90% occupancy in high season and an 88% guest satisfaction rate.

context.fr: Développement commercial export sur marchés émergents asiatiques, poste exercé 100% en anglais.
context.en: Export business development across emerging Asian markets, role carried out 100% in English.

fr: Stratégie export marchés émergents asiatiques, management équipe multiculturelle de 5, appels d'offres SAP Ariba.
Part export 5% → 20% du CA (~15M$ en 2019) ; poste exercé 100% en anglais.
en: Led an export strategy across emerging Asian markets; managed a 5-person multicultural team; coordinated SAP Ariba tenders.
Grew export revenue share from 5% to 20% (~USD 15M in 2019); role carried out 100% in English.

role.fr: Chargé de Stratégie Digitale & Business Dev

context.fr: Création d'un écosystème digital from-scratch pour la conquête de la zone francophone.
context.en: Built a digital ecosystem from scratch to enter the French-speaking market.

fr: Création écosystème digital from-scratch, SEO/SEA, lead generation zone francophone.
Gestion budget publicitaire 24k$/an Google Ads ; poste exercé 90% en anglais.
en: Built a digital ecosystem from scratch: SEO/SEA and lead generation for the French-speaking market.
Managed a USD 24k/year Google Ads budget; role carried out 90% in English.

role.fr: Chef de Projet Digital / Business Analyst

context.fr: MOE d'une refonte e-commerce sponsorisée par la direction générale.
context.en: Project ownership of an e-commerce revamp sponsored by the CEO.

fr: MOE refonte e-commerce (sponsor PDG), chemin critique MS Project, SEO/SEA 30 k€/an, reporting CODIR.
Trafic +196% · conversion +23% sur 2 ans, livré dans les jalons.
en: Owned an e-commerce revamp (CEO-sponsored): MS Project critical path, EUR 30k/year SEO/SEA, board reporting.
Delivered +196% traffic and +23% conversion over 2 years, on schedule.

context.fr: Coordination d'une refonte web multilingue et du social media bilingue à l'international.
context.en: Coordinating a multilingual website revamp and bilingual social media internationally.

fr: Coordination refonte site internet multilingue (supervision prestataires, traducteurs) et social media bilingue EN/FR.
Reporting mensuel CODIR et recommandation LinkedIn client.
en: Coordinated a multilingual website revamp (vendor and translator supervision) and bilingual EN/FR social media.
Monthly board reporting and a client LinkedIn recommendation.
